controls.name: Information Access Restriction
controls.objective: Access to information and application system functions shall be restricted in accordance with the access control policy
controls.implementation: Tenant isolation, RLS policies, JWT authentication, role-based access control

controls.name: Information Backup
controls.objective: Backup copies of information, software and system images shall be taken and tested regularly
controls.implementation: Automated backups, retention policies, recovery testing

controls.name: Event Logging
controls.objective: Event logs recording user activities, exceptions, faults and information security events shall be produced, kept and regularly reviewed
controls.implementation: Immutable audit logs, log monitoring, log retention

controls.name: Protection of Records
controls.objective: Records shall be protected from loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorized access and unauthorized release
controls.implementation: Regional data residency, data sovereignty, record retention

controls.name: Privacy and Protection of PII
controls.objective: Privacy and protection of personally identifiable information shall be ensured as required in relevant legislation and regulation
controls.implementation: PII masking, data protection, privacy controls
